title: tessenia glabella
intro: Tessenia glabella, also known as the Desert Honeysuckle or Wolfberry, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tessenia glabella include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Tessenia glabella can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
